brid-silent-track.name: Brid: Silent Track

findings: Wind-Code Damage-Taken debuffs (S1 15.12%, S2 12.12%) unmodeled — bossElement can't compose with fullBurstEnter/hitCount; inert vs non-Wind boss (engine extension: bossElementGate)
burst ATK+66.52% caster modeled on allies incl. self (kit: except self; no excludeSelf on plain allies) — minor self-inflation in bursting comps

caveats: skill1: Wind Code Damage Taken ▲ 15.12% (Full Burst entry, 10s) now modeled via bossElementGate 'Wind' — inert vs a non-Wind (incl. scope-lock) boss; a big team-wide lever if the boss is Wind.

skill2: Wind Code Damage Taken ▲ 12.12% (every 10 normal attacks = hitCount 100 at 10 pellets/shot, 10s) now modeled via bossElementGate 'Wind' — inert vs a non-Wind boss; stacks with the skill1 debuff vs a Wind boss.

burst: ATK ▲ 66.52% of caster's ATK on all allies EXCEPT self (kit 'except self') — excludeSelf:true enforced on the `allies` target since 2026-07-17; no longer self-inflates her own SG-capped damage.
